arts.ttl: David Beckham kick-starts punditry career after agreeing new TV role in America
arts.sum: David Beckham has agreed to a deal with Paramount+ that will see him star in an alternative Champions League broadcast, with the show set to resemble the popular 'ManningCast'

arts.ttl: David Beckham gives Kate Abdo personal gift with four-word message
arts.sum: David Beckham surprised CBS's Champions League studio by making a guest appearance on Tuesday, and he came bearing gifts for host Kate Abdo and her fellow pundits

arts.ttl: David Beckham gives perfect response to favourite pundit after Micah Richards question
arts.sum: David Beckham was a special guest on the first episode of the 2024/25 season of CBS Sports' "Champions League Today" and came armed with a new agreement with the network

arts.ttl: Tom Brady admits 'I can't repeat what was said' in Instagram message to David Beckham
arts.sum: Tom Brady's winning mentality has seemed to have rubbed off on Birmingham City who defeated Wrexham 3-1 to continue their unbeaten start to life in League One

arts.ttl: Tom Brady and David Beckham celebrate Birmingham goals in win against Wrexham
arts.sum: Tom Brady enjoyed bragging rights over Wrexham’s Hollywood owners as two goals from big-money summer signing Jay Stansfield earned Birmingham City a 3-1 victory at St Andrew’s on Monday night (16 September).

arts.ttl: Tom Brady thanks David Beckham for ‘teaching me to sing’ at Hollywood derby as Birmingham beat Wrexham
arts.sum: NFL legend Brady, a minority owner in Birmingham City, got the better of Wrexham co-owners Ryan Reynolds and Rob McElhenney at St Andrew’s

arts.ttl: When is Atlanta United - Inter Miami? how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: The game between Atlanta United - Inter Miami will be played on Wednesday September 18, with kick off at 7:30 p.m. ET / 4:30 p.m. PT . Form guide for Atlanta United - Inter Miami
